'''âng-d-k-ch''' ('''kangadkechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jayrun|jayrun]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-d-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jayrun|jayrun]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-d-k-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kangadkechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingadkechoko|thingadkechoko]] || [[word:jingadkechoko|jingadkechoko]] || [[word:shingadkechoko|shingadkechoko]] || [[word:kingadkechoko|kingadkechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungadkechoko|thuthungadkechoko]] || [[word:jujungadkechoko|jujungadkechoko]] || [[word:shushungadkechoko|shushungadkechoko]] || [[word:kukungadkechoko|kukungadkechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
